- adds a new function
- fixes #
- updates `README.md` with a better description for contributions

- closes # 

They will automatically close the issue(s) if/when this PR is merged.

#### (Optional) ⚡️after⚡️ this PR has been approved
- If this is a large PR with lots of commits, and many of those read like
     - `fix`, 
     - `fix typo`, 
     - `update stuff` 
     - `revert update stuff`
     - `adkfsj ... oops my cat sat on my keyboard, lol` -- hey, no judgement [we've all been there](https://xkcd.com/1296/).
- [ ] run an interactive rebase and squash the history, leaving a few selected meaningful commits.
